subcodes.first_line: O oppressed party of the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting One! From the realm of the Kingdom, with the glances of His eye of bounty, He gazeth upon His loved ones... If today the beloved ones of God would but turn their attention to His boundless grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حزب مظلوم حی قیوم از حیز ملکوت بلحظات عین عنایت بدوستانش ناظر... اگر الیوم احبای الهی ملتفت فضل غیرمتناهی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
